text: Thanks for meeting me. Let me put our offer on the table. We propose a four percent commission for a two-year contract. If you signed this week, we would waive the setup fee completely. Now, I know price matters, but think about the leverage. We are the largest marketplace in the region. If you partnered with us, you would reach ten times more renters than you do today. That is the real value here.

I appreciate the offer, but four percent is above our bottom line. Here is our counteroffer: three percent, and we would commit to a higher volume. If you could meet us at three and a half, we would sign for three years. Exclusivity, however, is a deal-breaker for us. If we agreed to exclusivity, we would lose our other channels. So let us meet halfway on the rate and drop the exclusivity. That feels like a fair trade-off.
